title: postapiauthloginwithvalidcredentials
description: Verify that POST /api/auth/login with valid credentials returns 200 status, sets the httpOnly cookie instant_access_token, and returns the user profile with correct fields.

title: getapiproductswithvalidqueryparameters
description: Verify that GET /api/products with valid category, search, sort, and pagination parameters returns 200 status with a list of matching products and correct pagination metadata.

title: postapicartitemswithvalidproductandquantity
description: Verify that POST /api/cart/items with valid productId and quantity updates the cart correctly and returns 200 status with updated cart totals.

title: getapiaddresseswithauthentication
description: Verify that GET /api/addresses with a valid authenticated session returns 200 status with the user's saved addresses.

title: postapiorderscheckoutwithvaliddata
description: Verify that POST /api/orders/checkout with valid cart, address, and payment method creates an order successfully, returns 200 or 201 status, and server calculates correct totals.

title: postapipaymentsstripecreatesessionwithvalidorder
description: Verify that POST /api/payments/stripe/create-session with a valid order returns 200 status with Stripe checkout session details for payment processing.

title: getapiorderswithauthentication
description: Verify that GET /api/orders with authenticated cookie returns 200 status with the list of the user's past orders including order details and status history.

title: postapireviewswithdeliveredorderitem
description: Verify that POST /api/reviews with details of a delivered order item and valid rating/comment creates a review successfully and returns 201 status.

title: getapiadminanalyticswithadminauthorization
description: Verify that GET /api/admin/analytics with valid admin authentication returns 200 status with sales, orders, users, products, and out-of-stock metrics.

title: putapiadminordersidstatuswithvalidstatus
description: Verify that PUT /api/admin/orders/:id/status with a valid next status and optional note updates the order status successfully and returns 200 status with updated order and status history.
